content.en:
Perfect Eternal Realm Spirit Inheritance!

Ye Tian knew that the outside world would speculate that the human race had a perfect eternal realm spirit inheritance, but he would definitely not admit it.

So, he said, "Our human race doesn't have a perfect Eternal Realm spirit inheritance, and as for giving up eighty percent of the territory, it is even more impossible!"

The Heavenly Phoenix Realm God naturally didn't believe Ye Tian's words, as for whether the human race had a perfect Eternal Realm Spirit, he would know it after taking Ye Tian.

He could completely grasp Ye Tian and study the Eternal Realm Spirit inside Ye Tian's Eternal Dao Species, and there was a special way to detect whether the Eternal Realm Spirit was a perfect Eternal Realm Spirit.

"Ye Tianjie God, then don't blame me for making a move!"

The god of the Tianfeng Realm didn't say a word, and directly started it.

The other high-level realm gods of the Heavenly Fire God Alliance retreated, not interfering with the battle between the Heavenly Phoenix Realm God and Ye Tian.

Of course, they didn't think that Ye Tian's "Three Seven Three" would be able to block the attack of the Heavenly Phoenix Realm God, and it was estimated that one or two moves would be able to capture the Ye Heavenly Realm God.

However, they were soon dumbfounded.

Thundered!!!!

Ye Tian and the Heavenly Phoenix Realm Divine Shrine were killed, and their combat effectiveness was almost comparable.

"How can this be !!!"

The Heavenly Phoenix Realm God was shocked.

Ye Tian's strength was not weaker than him, he was completely beyond his expectations.

It stands to reason that the high-level realm gods who condensed the seven Eternal Realm Spirits could not be the opponents of the high-level realm gods who condensed the nine Eternal Realm Spirits, and the difference in strength was too great!

But now, Ye Tian's strength has broken his cognition.

He had a guess in his heart, but he couldn't believe it, he was more inclined to Ye Tian to have some kind of supreme treasure that could temporarily increase his combat power, and he didn't want to believe that Ye Tian had a perfect eternal Dao seed and seven perfect level eternal realm spirits, and every step had reached the limit, so he had such strength.

But is it possible?

Even if it is a supreme force, it may not have such a high-level realm god!

"Quinoa Fire Realm God, come and help me!"

The Heavenly Phoenix Realm God sent a message to another high-level Realm God of the Heavenly Fire God Alliance for help.

This Quinoa Fire Realm God is also a high-level realm god who has condensed nine Eternal Realm Spirits, and his strength is even more powerful than him.

Now, the Heavenly Fire God Alliance has bullied the human race again and again, and it is irreconcilable.

Therefore, he had a bold idea, that is, to unite with the Quinoa Fire Realm God and besiege and kill Ye Tian.

Such a demonic enemy must not be allowed to live.

Although doing so will undoubtedly make the Boundary Court Headquarters punish the Heavenly Fire God Alliance, the price paid by the top forces to destroy a powerful force is not large, that is, because the human race is very close to the top forces, this will be punished.

If it is an ordinary powerful force, if they want to destroy it, there will be no problem at all.

Time passes slowly.

Finally, the god of the Quinoa Fire Realm has descended.

Rumble!!!

The void tore apart, and the Quinoa Fire Realm God finally descended.

"Meet the Quinoa Fire Realm God!"

The high-level realm gods of the Heavenly Fire God Alliance said respectfully.

The Quinoa Realm God is a high-level pinnacle realm god hidden by the Heavenly Fire God Alliance, usually very low-key, and has been guarding a treasure land, if it weren't for the help of the Tianfeng Realm God, he would not have been able to come here.

Seeing that the Quinoa Fire Realm God was coming, the Tianfeng Realm God breathed a sigh of relief, and immediately shouted: "Quinoa Fire, join me to kill the Ye Heaven Realm God!"

"Good!"

The Quinoa Fire Realm God responded, and immediately killed Ye Tian.

With the addition of the Quinoa Fire Realm God, Ye Tian was instantly at a disadvantage.

Moreover, the strength of the Quinoa Fire Realm God is even stronger, and if this continues, Ye Tian will soon be injured.

"Quinoa, fight hard, I can't let such an enemy escape!"

The Heavenly Phoenix Realm God said.

"Then let's do it!"

The Quinoa Realm God is also very clear, once a realm god like Ye Tian escapes this time, he only needs to condense an Eternal Realm Spirit, and the entire Heavenly Fire God Alliance will not be able to help Ye Tian, and may even be destroyed by Ye Tian.

So, they absolutely don't allow that to happen.

Bang!!!!

Endless flames enveloped Ye Tian, and this was also a very powerful Eternal Realm Spirit Technique.

However, Ye Tian didn't have the slightest idea of escaping, and even smiled.

Seeing Ye Tian's smile, the Quinoa Fire Realm God instinctively sensed a hint of danger.

"Are you Heavenly Fire God Alliance just these two high-level peak realm gods?"

Ye Tian's voice came out.

The Quinoa Fire Realm God and the Heavenly Phoenix Realm God felt a little bad, Ye Tian was too calm, as if it was they who were in a weak position, not Ye Tian0 .....

Suddenly.

The expressions of the other high-level realm gods changed drastically, and one after another Ye Tian's copied bodies appeared around them.

"It's a clone!"

The face of the Quinoa Fire Realm God changed.

The Heavenly Phoenix Realm God had heard that the Ye Heavenly Realm God had a clone, but he didn't care, after all, the clone was definitely not as strong as the main body, and it didn't have too strong combat power, so it definitely couldn't fight beyond the level, so it didn't need to care.

But now, he knew that he had underestimated Ye Tian.

Rumble!!!!!

Several of Ye Tian's replica bodies participated in unison, showing incomparably powerful combat power, and each replica body was exactly the same combat power.

"This is the doppelganger???"

The Quinoa Fire Realm God and the Tianfeng Realm God were all stunned, this is simply the ontology!

I knew that Ye Tian was so powerful, how could they dare to provoke the human race!

"Retreat!"

The Quinoa Fire Realm God shouted.

The high-level realm gods of the Heavenly Fire God Alliance wanted to escape, but the surrounding void instantly shook, and these high-level realm gods were locked by a terrifying domain force.

Bang bang bang!!!

The bodies of these high-level realm gods burst open one by one, their strength was too weak, and they couldn't stop Ye Tian's realm power at all.

Immediately afterward, Tianyan Red Dragon Flame burned their shattered flesh into ashes, killing these high-level realm gods one by one.

"Ye Tian !!!!"

The Quinoa Fire Realm God and the Heavenly Phoenix Realm God were extremely angry. 1.0

These are all high-level realm gods, every loss of one will make the Heavenly Fire God Alliance suffer heavy losses, but now it has lost so many high-level realm gods.

This is an irreconcilable mortal enemy!

However, what they really need to worry about at the moment is themselves, Ye Tian will not let them go.

At this time, Ye Tian was also desperately burning, burning the Eternal Dao Seed, and one of the replica bodies was holding the Tianyan Spear, a supreme realm soldier, fighting with the Quinoa Fire Realm God and them.

Time gradually passed, and the Quinoa Fire Realm God was not lightly injured, and they were entangled by Ye Tian's several replica bodies, and they couldn't get out at all.

I don't know how long it has been, but the gods of the Heavenly Phoenix Realm finally can't bear it.

His body was pierced by Ye Tian's Tianyan spear, and his vitality gradually dissipated.

In the end, the god of the Heavenly Phoenix Realm fell.
